titleStmt.title: SII 41.82: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 82. (A.R. No. 81 of 1905.) Sōḻavandāṉ, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Janakanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ temple at Sōḻavandāṉ.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. Māṟavaman Sundara-pāṇḍya II, Year 2 = 1240 A.D.

summary.p: This is the king's order remitting the mākkalam tax towards viniyōgam by the sabhā of Chōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam during both the perumpū and kuṟuvai cropping seasons on the occasion of his coronation anniversary. This was made on representation by the king's senior officer Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūtalavaṉitai metaka viḷaṅka mantara mārpiṟ nittirai yiruppa puyavarai
taḻuvi vayamakaḷ kaḷippa mayal luṟu ciṟiya māmuṉi terinta Iyalicai nāṭakameḻil
peṟa vaḷara vañciṉaṅkūṟi matakaḷiṟaṭarnta veñciṉa veṅkai villuṭaṉeḷippa tikkaṭipaṭu
ttuc cakkarañ cella pauvva mānilam pāttivar potuvuṟat teyva meruvil ce
l viḷaiyāṭa voṉṟu puriṉeñcat tiru vakaip piṟappiṉ muṉṉūl mārpiṉṉāṉmaṟaiyāḷa
r mākavicumpiṉ vāṉavark kamaitta yākaveḷviyiṭantoṟu miyala Aimpulaṉkaṭkkumaṟumai
cālaṟuvakaic cemporuṭ camaiyañ ciruṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻupoḻil kavitta muḻumatik kavitait tiru ni
lavu corinta Irunilavaraippiṉ veṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkōl naṭappa viṇperuñ cikaramātira veṇ
koṭṭeṇ peruṅkaḷiṟu Icaimakaḷeṟa Oṉpatu kaṇṭattuyarkula ventarum Aṉpuṭaṉ vaṇaṅki Aruntiṟai
kāṭṭa Aṇitaṭa muṭi melaṭi malar cūṭa maṇimuṭi cūṭi vaḷaṅkeḻu kavari cerar cempiyar tiraṇṭoru tacaippa vīra
simhāsaṉattu merunāppaṭak kaṭavuḷ miṉiṟ kaṟput tikaḻa Uṭaṉ muṭicūṭi Ulakam poṟṟac
cerumali tāṉaip pār puraventar Āṭakattoḷum Ākamum piriyāvoṭeri neṭuṅkaṇṭo
ṇṭoṭi makaḷir tilata nutalimel cevaṭi vaikkum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum vī
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakka komutaṟ koccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa tiri
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu .§
§svastiśrītribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ pākaṉūr
k kūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakac caturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyārkku taṅka
ḷūr Irupattiraṇṭāvatu varai viṉiyokamāttāl tiramam nālum nel
lu Aṟukalamum kuṟuvai viḷaiñca nilattu māttāl tiramam Oṉṟaraiye yira
ṇṭumāvum nellu nāṟkkalaṉe tūṇippatakkumāka Iṟuttu vantamaiyil
Iraṇṭāvatu mutal tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum kuṟuvai viḷaiñca ni
lattukku māttāl tiramam mukkāle Orumā nellu Irukalame mukkuṟu
ṇiyum dharmmadāṉamākat tavirap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar nama
kkuc coṉṉamaiyil taṅkaḷur Irupatiraṇṭāvatu varai viṉiyokamāka mā
ttāl tiramam nālum nellu Aṟukalamum kuṟuvai viḷaiñca nilattukku māttāl tira
mam Oṉṟaraiye Iraṇṭumāvum nellu nāṟkalane tūṇi patakkum Iṟuttu
vantamaiyil Iraṇṭāvatu mutal māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu mukkalamum ku
ṟuvai viḷaiñca nilattukku māttāl tiramam kāle Orumāvum nellu Irukalaṉe
mukkuṟuṇiyum dharmmadāṉamāka tavirntum Ippaṭi cantrādittaval celvatāka ka
llilum cempilum veṭṭuvittukkoḷka Ivai
nellukkuṟucci Ulakamuṇṭāṉ tevaṉāṉa cempiyataraiyaṉ [eḻuttu§yāṇ]
ṭu2vatu nāḷ 6 10 8l Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟa vaṭapāmpāṟṟu
pāṇaviccātiranallūr Aṇṭak kuṭaiya tēvapirāṉ Aḻakiya
Eḻuttu Ivai karuṅkuṭināṭṭuk kiḻneṭṭūr raṇakīrtti vicālaiyaṉ
§toṇṭaimāṉār Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 41.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
